questionHtml:
Two resistors of equal resistance R are connected with two cells of emf ε and 2ε. Both cells have negligible internal resistance.

What is the current in the resistor labelled X?


A.  ε2R

B.  3ε2R

C.  εR

D.  3εR

meta.title: Two resistors of equal resistance R are connected with two cells of emf ε and 2ε. Both cells have negligible internal resistance. What is the current in the resistor labelled X? A.
